ingredients.item: YIELD: 2 cups (370 g)
ingredients.original: YIELD: 2 cups (370 g)

ingredients.item: ¾ ounce (21 g) dried chili peppers (such as guajillo, Kashmiri, or any other pepper), sliced lengthwise and seeds and stems removed
ingredients.original: ¾ ounce (21 g) dried chili peppers (such as guajillo, Kashmiri, or any other pepper), sliced lengthwise and seeds and stems removed

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons caraway seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons caraway seeds

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons cumin seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons cumin seeds

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons coriander seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons coriander seeds

ingredients.item: 6½ ounces (180 g) jarred roasted red peppers
ingredients.original: 6½ ounces (180 g) jarred roasted red peppers

ingredients.item: 1 cup (50 g) sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original: 1 cup (50 g) sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item: 4 large cloves garlic, peeled
ingredients.original: 4 large cloves garlic, peeled

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons grated lemon zest
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons grated lemon zest

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil, plus more for topping
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil, plus more for topping

ingredients.item: 1 Bring water to a boil in a kettle or pot.
ingredients.original: 1 Bring water to a boil in a kettle or pot.

ingredients.item: 2 Place the chili peppers in a medium bowl and submerge them in boiling water. Cover with foil or a lid and let sit for 15 minutes.
ingredients.original: 2 Place the chili peppers in a medium bowl and submerge them in boiling water. Cover with foil or a lid and let sit for 15 minutes.

ingredients.item: 3 In a small, dry skillet, toast the caraway, cumin, and coriander seeds over low heat for 2 minutes, or until fragrant, stirring continuously. Transfer the toasted seeds to a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder and grind into a powder (see Note).
ingredients.original: 3 In a small, dry skillet, toast the caraway, cumin, and coriander seeds over low heat for 2 minutes, or until fragrant, stirring continuously. Transfer the toasted seeds to a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder and grind into a powder (see Note).

ingredients.item: 4 Drain the chili peppers and gently pat them and the red peppers dry. Add the chilies, ground seeds, red peppers, sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, salt, lemon juice, lemon zest, and oil to a small food processor and process until a smooth paste forms. Taste and adjust for more salt if needed. (If you prefer it spicier, add more chili peppers.)
ingredients.original: 4 Drain the chili peppers and gently pat them and the red peppers dry. Add the chilies, ground seeds, red peppers, sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, salt, lemon juice, lemon zest, and oil to a small food processor and process until a smooth paste forms. Taste and adjust for more salt if needed. (If you prefer it spicier, add more chili peppers.)

ingredients.item: 5 Transfer the harissa to a 2-cup (480 ml) container with an airtight lid. Cover the top with an even layer of oil, seal the lid, and store in the refrigerator and use within 2 to 3 weeks. Always use a clean utensil when serving and replenish the olive oil layer with each use.
ingredients.original: 5 Transfer the harissa to a 2-cup (480 ml) container with an airtight lid. Cover the top with an even layer of oil, seal the lid, and store in the refrigerator and use within 2 to 3 weeks. Always use a clean utensil when serving and replenish the olive oil layer with each use.

ingredients.item: YIELD: 1½ cups (360 g)
ingredients.original: YIELD: 1½ cups (360 g)

ingredients.item: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley (about 1 bunch)
ingredients.original: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley (about 1 bunch)

ingredients.item: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro (about ½ bunch)
ingredients.original: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro (about ½ bunch)
